category_sources: Official ViSP sources describe it as a cross-platform visual tracking and visual servoing library.
source_facts.description says ViSP is the Visual Servoing Platform library.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and repository use ViSP capitalization.
source_facts.description expands the acronym as Visual Servoing Platform.
docs_sources: Official search result and user-facing references point to visp-doc.inria.fr Doxygen documentation.
source_facts.source-archive is hosted under visp-doc.inria.fr, the official ViSP documentation/download domain.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository is lagadic/visp and describes ViSP as the Open Source Visual Servoing Platform.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from official ViSP GitHub project references.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository describes visual tracking, visual servoing, cross-platform support, and C++ implementation.
